pi_items.source: Web search results from official Khan Academy website (https://www.khanacademy.org/) confirm the organization name is 'Khan Academy'
Web search confirms Khan Academy's official website domain is www.khanacademy.org (https://www.khanacademy.org/)
Web search results from official Coursera website (https://www.coursera.org) confirm the organization name is 'Coursera'
Web search confirms Coursera's official website domain is www.coursera.org (https://www.coursera.org/)
Web search results from official MIT OpenCourseWare website (https://ocw.mit.edu/) confirm the organization name is 'MIT OpenCourseWare'
Web search confirms MIT OpenCourseWare's official website domain is ocw.mit.edu (https://ocw.mit.edu/)

Lighthouse tool documentation from Microsoft Learn (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-edge/devtools-guide-chromium/lighthouse/lighthouse-tool) and Chrome for Developers (https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse) confirm Performance is one of Lighthouse's core audit categories

Lighthouse tool documentation from Microsoft Learn (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-edge/devtools/accessibility/lighthouse) and Chrome for Developers confirm Accessibility is one of Lighthouse's core audit categories

Microsoft Learn documentation (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-edge/devtools-guide-chromium/lighthouse/lighthouse-tool) and GitHub Lighthouse repository (https://github.com/GoogleChrome/lighthouse) confirm Lighthouse is integrated into Microsoft Edge DevTools

privileged_info_summary: The task audits three real educational websites using the Lighthouse tool available in Microsoft Edge DevTools. All three target websites are verified to be real platforms with correct metadata: Khan Academy (khanacademy.org), Coursera (coursera.org), and MIT OpenCourseWare (ocw.mit.edu). The required audit metrics, Performance and Accessibility, are confirmed as core Lighthouse audit categories supported by both Chrome and Microsoft Edge. The task does not use synthetic data but instead interacts with real, public educational websites.
